title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 24 May 2024
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 24 May 2024
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 24 May 2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 24/05/2024
This week, ship recycling destinations experienced mixed performances: In India, the market is strong with rising booking prices driven by robust local demand. Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2024-05-24_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-18-May-24-May-2024_compressed.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/demolition/pdfs/2024-05-24_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-18-May-24-May-2024_compressed.pdf

[Page 1]
Weekly Ship Recycling Report
18 May - 24 May 2024
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
This week, ship recycling destinations experienced mixed performances: In India, the market is strong with rising booking prices driven by robust local
demand. The post-election outlook is favorable, with anticipated growth fueled by increased steel demand and improved financial conditions.
